calendar.matters:
DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Off Calendar

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2017 Continued To Feb-15-18 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Ryan C. Kujawski of BERKES CRANE ROBINSON & SEAL LLP (213-955-1150), appearing for defendant / moving party Insul Company, Inc.
Geoff T. Sloniker of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Melvin Davis & Viola Davis

RULING:
DEFENDANT INSUL COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE

No argument made and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Insul Company, Inc.'s motion to transfer venue to Los Angeles County is granted. No opposition filed. This action is transferred to the County of Los Angeles. However there is no showing that defendant paid the costs and fees for transfer when it filed its motion, and plaintiffs' conditional non-opposition is conditioned on defendant paying the full costs and fees to transfer the case, therefore this action shall not be prosecuted in any court until the required costs and fees are paid. (C.C.P. 399(a).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, matter not reported (503/CML)
